head: c3fcd93
equalized: 120x40 / Menlo 14 where pinnable; Termy grid=native-default (no size key)

scroll_retention_noa_ms.note: scrollback-limit=1000000 ~1040 rows ~ Termy 1000-line; asymmetry now within noise -> scroll is retention-independent post-fix

latency_us.method: noa/ghostty no-activation interleaved 2000-iter x3 (per-round: noa median 15/16/16 p99 42/51/53; ghostty median 35/36/36 p99 153/129/151); termy/kitty activation-required

startup_ms.note: window_visible via CGWindowList; usable=max(pty_ready,window_visible). noa window-visible improved 228->143 (cycle-3 pre-painted frame)

idle_cpu_noa_pct.note: 30s idle; valleys at 0.0-0.1% prove no busy-spin -> prewarm workers park; 1.2-1.3% blips are periodic UI timers (cursor blink etc). Not flagged (avg<1%, no sustained burn).
